title: PM Lane 189 - PM Intake Field Start Stop-Line Quick Review
authority: repo technical authority; PM lane implementation authority; final integration authority
objective: Expose a phone-first, browser-local field-start stop-line quick review inside the PM intake workbench so Jason can confirm blocked field, production, customer, and finance boundaries before the Temp Power morning-of conversation without creating a new artifact, route, storage key, hosted call, or write path.
scope: Added a `Local Field Start Stop-Line Quick Review` panel directly under the Lane 188 operator script on `/pm-review/import-intake`.
Derived five linked stop-line cards from existing field-start preflight and not-allowed boundary state.
Covered field authority, assignment/schedule/status, durable record/production, customer/finance, and context-only boundaries.
Kept the panel links/cards only: no buttons, no export action, no text inputs, no persisted disclosure state, and no backend route.

Extended the focused read-only PM import-intake smoke to prove desktop presence, `390x844` mobile visibility, initial and populated field-start states, five links, zero buttons, no stop-line quick-review storage key, and zero mutation calls.
Used a read-only sidecar to confirm the safest placement, copy risks, proof assertions, and no-write boundary while VS Code Codex retained PM implementation and final integration authority.
guardrails: No Supabase, Render, Vercel, or Olares product action.
No browser approval button, approval POST wiring, approval submission, or approval-row creation.
No new export action, filename, payload version, localStorage schema, backend route, handler, service/auth/ingress change, or autonomous AI business-state mutation.

No field authorization, lead or crew assignment, schedule/status write, durable field record, production tracking, customer report, completion evidence, billing, payroll, invoice, accounting, or external finance-system write.
